title: UK inflation jumps to 3.3% in March as fuel prices surge amid Iran war
summary_full: Fuel prices saw their largest increase for over three years, the ONS' chief economist said.
summary_public: Fuel prices saw their largest increase for over three years, the ONS' chief economist said.
